name: tasktime
description: TaskTime local MCP bridge bundle for OpenClaw-compatible agent platforms.

interface.shortDescription: Use TaskTime through its local MCP bridge.
interface.longDescription: Adds TaskTime skill guidance and MCP server configuration for same-device agents to manage tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, reports, planning, sync, and navigation after explicit TaskTime pairing.
defaultPrompt: List my TaskTime projects and active timers.
Draft an invoice from unbilled TaskTime work.
